name: KnowBe4, Inc.
description: KnowBe4 is a leading provider of security awareness training and simulated phishing platforms, designed to help organizations manage the human element of cybersecurity. By empowering employees to make smarter security decisions, the company addresses risks such as ransomware, CEO fraud, and social engineering. The KnowBe4 platform offers a comprehensive suite of tools, including attack simulation, real-time coaching, and AI-driven defense agents, to create a robust security culture. Trusted by over 70,000 organizations worldwide, KnowBe4 is a pioneer in digital workforce security, helping teams secure both human users and AI agents against evolving threats.
